top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date) BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN '20s'
        WHEN strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date) BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN '30s'
        WHEN strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date) BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN '40s'
        WHEN strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date) BETWEEN 50 AND 59 THEN '50s'
        ELSE 'others'
    END AS age_category,
    COUNT(*) AS user_count
FROM mst_users
GROUP BY 
    CASE 
 ...

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date) BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN '20s'
    WHEN strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date) BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN '30s'
    WHEN strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date) BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN '40s'
    WHEN strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date) BETWEEN 50 AND 59 THEN '50s'
    ELSE 'others'
  END AS age_category,
  COUNT(*) AS user_count
FROM mst_users
WHERE birth_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY age_categ...

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date)) >= 20 AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date)) < 30 THEN '20s'
    WHEN (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date)) >= 30 AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date)) < 40 THEN '30s'
    WHEN (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date)) >= 40 AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date)) < 50 THEN '40s'
    WHEN (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date))...
